name: Vision 2030 — Sustainability & Localisation KPIs
standard: Saudi Vision 2030 — National Transformation Programme + Quality of Life Programme + Saudi Green Initiative (SGI)
regulator: Vision 2030 Realisation Programmes (oversight: Council of Economic and Development Affairs / CEDA)
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that report each project against Vision 2030 KPIs that procurement teams must answer in public tenders: IKTVA / Local Content score, Saudi Green Initiative carbon-budget alignment, energy intensity target (per Saudi Energy Efficiency Programme), water intensity target (50% non-potable substitution for new developments), waste-diversion-from-landfill (Vision 2030 target: 60% by 2035), and Saudi-supplier preference. Surfaces a Vision 2030 score chip on the project header.
description_ar: تفعيل قواعد التحقق لقياس المشاريع وفق مؤشرات رؤية 2030 — المحتوى المحلي IKTVA، المبادرة السعودية الخضراء، كثافة الطاقة والمياه، وتحويل النفايات.
